overview: Based on the published agenda, the Wausau School District Board of Education's Committee of the Whole meeting on May 18, 2026 was scheduled to address several significant action items including the preliminary 2026-27 budget, employee handbook updates, and meal price changes. The board was also expected to consider policy revisions related to home-based schooling and athletics codes, as well as approve an HVAC and roofing project for Riverview Elementary.

agenda.item: Excellence in Action: Thomas Jefferson Elementary
Policy 9270 - Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling (Action Requested)
Policy 2431.01 - High School Activities Code (Action Requested)

discussions.item: Excellence in Action: Thomas Jefferson Elementary
discussions.body: Thomas Jefferson Elementary was scheduled to be recognized as part of the district's Excellence in Action program. No additional details or presenter information were provided in the agenda.

Tabatha Gundrum was scheduled to present the Employee Handbook updates for the 2026-27 school year in an estimated 5-minute presentation. The board was expected to review and consider approval of the updated handbook.

Elizabeth Channel, Assistant Superintendent of Operations, was scheduled to present the preliminary budget for 2026-27 in an estimated 10-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider approval of the initial budget framework for the upcoming school year.

Karen Fochs was scheduled to present proposed changes to the 2026-2027 paid meal prices in an estimated 5-minute presentation. Supporting documentation included a meal price action sheet and PLE Tool for the upcoming school year.

Dr. Jon Tomski and BJ Brandt were scheduled to present suggested changes to the Athletic and Activities Code in an estimated 10-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider approval of the updated 2026-2027 Code of Conduct.

discussions.item: Policy 9270 - Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling
discussions.body: Dr. Jon Tomski was scheduled to present a proposed change to Policy 9270 regarding Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling in an estimated 5-minute presentation. Action was requested from the board on this policy revision.

Dr. Jon Tomski was scheduled to present proposed changes to Policy 2431.01 - High School Activities Code in an estimated 5-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider approval of the policy updates.

Ryan Urmanski, Director of Buildings and Grounds, was scheduled to present the Riverview HVAC and roofing project in an estimated 10-minute presentation. The board was expected to consider approval of the RFP for this facilities improvement project.

publicComment: A public and student comment period was included on the agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on approval of the April 13, 2026 regular meeting minutes
Action was requested for Employee Handbook Updates for 2026-27
Board was expected to vote on the Recommendation for Preliminary 2026-27 Budget
Action was requested for the 2026-2027 Paid Meal Price Update
Board was expected to vote on the Activities & Athletics Code changes
Action was requested for Policy 9270 - Home-Based, Private, or Tribal Schooling revisions
Board was expected to vote on Policy 2431.01 - High School Activities Code changes
Action was requested for the Riverview RFP Approval for HVAC and roofing project
title: Committee of the Whole Meeting - 2026-05-18
